rationale.fidelity: Correct here-and-now zone allocation, fixed stock, correlated demand, no-transfer rule, and expected shortage-plus-holding objective; feasibility details are slightly implicit.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly presents concentration versus coverage and the consequences of immobile inventory.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids contribution claims and remains bounded, without literature positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels correlation as a model assumption and explicitly rejects foresight and rebalancing claims.
rationale.overall: A strong, compact inventory-allocation framing with only minor mapping compression.
